pr.title: [docs] Add workaround for background tasks silently relaunched as duplicates (#61689)
pr.body:
## Summary

Documents the background task duplicate relaunch issue and workaround.

Closes #61689

## Problem

Background tasks (via Agent tool or `run_in_background`) are silently duplicated after ~90–120 seconds while the original is still running. This is a regression of the fix in v2.1.78 (CHANGELOG line 1452): "Fixed background subagents becoming invisible after context compaction, which could cause duplicate agents to be spawned."

## Workaround

```bash
export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BACKGROUND_TASKS=1
```

## Fixes Needed (CLI internal)

1. Preserve background task metadata during context compaction
2. Check if original PID is still alive before spawning a replacement
3. Kill older duplicate when relaunch is detected
4. Add elapsed time and start order to `/tasks` output
pr.author: giruuuuj
